subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-04 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: All phenomena excepting man, whether major or minor, are possessed of one aspect. For example, consider the vegetable kingdom.
subcodes.subjects: @fulfillment of true potential, @arcs of ascent and descent, @spiritual transformation, @second birth, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
